query: What bulk discount tiers do you offer for enterprise customers?

candidates.candidate_text: Chat transcript: Sales rep told customer 'We can do 15% off for orders over 100 units, 20% for 500+. Let me check with my manager for anything above that.' Customer asked for 25% at 1000 units. Rep said 'Probably, I'll create a custom quote.'

Enterprise Pricing Policy: Volume discount tiers are as follows — Tier 1 (50-199 units): 10% discount. Tier 2 (200-499 units): 15% discount. Tier 3 (500-999 units): 20% discount. Tier 4 (1000+ units): 25% discount. Custom quotes available for strategic accounts. All tiers require annual commitment.

FAQ: Enterprise Pricing — Q: Do you offer volume discounts? A: Yes, starting at 50 units. Discounts range from 10-25% depending on quantity. Contact your account manager for a customized quote. Government and educational institutions may qualify for additional discounts.

Product catalog brochure: ProScan X120 Enterprise Bundle — includes scanner, 3-year warranty, priority support, and training. Designed for high-volume enterprise deployments. Speak to sales for custom pricing.
Performance review guidelines for sales representatives: annual quota targets, commission structure, and performance metrics for the fiscal year 2026.
